# Compose GenUI - AI Context

## Project Overview
Compose GenUI is an Android/Kotlin Multiplatform library that allows streaming Server-Driven UI directly from Large Language Models (LLMs) and rendering them as native Jetpack Compose components. 
It does not use WebViews. It parses JSON into native Compose nodes.

## Core Schema (UiNode)
The UI is built using a recursive JSON structure represented by `UiNode`.
Valid types include: "Column", "Row", "Card", "Text", "Button".

Example JSON payload expected from LLMs:
{
  "type": "Column",
  "children": [
    {
      "type": "Text",
      "props": { "text": "Hello World", "color": "#000000" }
    }
  ],
  "props": {}
}

## How to Contribute
When contributing code, ensure you are interacting with:
1. `UiNode.kt` (for schema changes)
2. `GenUIParser.kt` (for parsing JSON streams)
3. `GenerativeRenderer.kt` (for Jetpack Compose rendering logic)

Do not hallucinate Android Views; stick strictly to Jetpack Compose.
